pages.latin_text: Tempore Bellī Secundī Orbis Terrārum Petrus, Susanna, Edmundus et Lucia Pevensiē in domō Professōris habitābant.
pages.english_text: During World War II, Peter, Susan, Edmund, and Lucy Pevensie lived in the Professor's house.
pages.image_prompt: Four children arriving at a large old countryside house during wartime, with airplanes in distant sky, rainy atmosphere, warm interior light from windows, eye-level view centered on the group approaching the door, simple shapes and flat colors evoking safety amid chaos.

pages.latin_text: Diē pluviōsō Luciā in armārium intrāvit.
pages.english_text: On a rainy day, Lucy entered the wardrobe.
pages.image_prompt: Rainy day inside a dusty room, open wardrobe door with fur coats visible, window showing storm outside, slightly above eye-level focusing on the wardrobe, cool blues and grays with soft lighting.

pages.latin_text: Subitō in terram nivis cecidit.
pages.english_text: Suddenly she fell into the snowy land.
pages.image_prompt: Lucy tumbling through fur coats into a snowy forest, transition from dark wardrobe to bright white snow, dynamic falling pose, eye-level perspective capturing surprise, clean shapes with stark contrast.

pages.latin_text: Lampā lūcēns viam mōnstrābat.
pages.english_text: A glowing lamp showed the way.
pages.image_prompt: Snowy Narnian forest with a magical glowing lamppost in center, soft light illuminating snowflakes and trees, mysterious mood, centered composition at eye-level, gentle shading in cool whites and yellow glow.

pages.latin_text: Faunus Tumnus Luciam ad theam invītāvit.
pages.english_text: Faun Tumnus invited Lucy to tea.
pages.image_prompt: Cozy faun's cave entrance in snowy woods, table set with teapot and scones, welcoming warm firelight contrasting cold outside, eye-level view on invitation gesture, bright flat colors inside.

pages.latin_text: Dīxit Albam Maleficam semper hiemem facere et diem Nātālem vetāre.
pages.english_text: He said the White Witch makes eternal winter and forbids Christmas.
pages.image_prompt: Inside cave, faun explaining with sad expression over tea, window showing endless snow, somber mood with dim firelight, centered on conversation, simple shading.

pages.latin_text: Posteā Luciam domum redīre iussit, quamquam id facere nōn licēbat.
pages.english_text: Afterward he ordered Lucy to return home, though it was not allowed.
pages.image_prompt: Faun helping Lucy toward wardrobe exit, conflicted expression, snowy path outside, tense but kind mood, eye-level on farewell, soft warm cave light.

pages.latin_text: Frātrēs eī nōn crēdidērunt.
pages.english_text: Her siblings did not believe her.
pages.image_prompt: Children in house room, Lucy telling story excitedly while others laugh disbelievingly, wardrobe in background, indoor lighting, centered on group skepticism, playful colors.

pages.latin_text: Mox omnēs armārium intrāvērunt et Narniam vēram invēnērunt.
pages.english_text: Soon all entered the wardrobe and found real Narnia.
pages.image_prompt: Four children pushing through coats into snowy forest, amazed faces emerging, lamppost visible, dynamic entry action, eye-level perspective, bright snow contrast.

pages.latin_text: Edmundus clam discessit et Maleficam in currū ā rēnis tractō convenit.
pages.english_text: Edmund sneaked away and met the Witch in her reindeer-pulled sledge.
pages.image_prompt: Snowy path with reindeer sledge approaching, mysterious winter fog, centered on meeting moment, cold blue lighting with sledge lanterns, slightly above view for drama.

pages.latin_text: Malefica Edmundō dēliciās Turcīcās dedit.
pages.english_text: The Witch gave Edmund Turkish Delights.
pages.image_prompt: Inside sledge, Witch offering tray of sweets, tempting atmosphere, close-up on exchange, dim interior light with snowy backdrop, eye-level focus.

pages.latin_text: Prōmīsit eum rēgem factūram esse, sī frātrēs trāderet.
pages.english_text: She promised to make him king if he betrayed his siblings.
pages.image_prompt: Witch whispering promise, Edmund eating sweets greedily, sly mood in sledge interior, centered composition, shadowy lighting emphasizing temptation.

pages.latin_text: Aliī ad domum Castorum vēnērunt.
pages.english_text: The others came to the Beavers' house.
pages.image_prompt: Cozy beaver dam by frozen river, children arriving at door, welcoming warm light from inside, snowy exterior, eye-level on approach, gentle colors.

pages.latin_text: Ibi audiērunt Aslanem, leōnem magnum, redīre.
pages.english_text: There they heard the great lion Aslan was returning.
pages.image_prompt: Inside dam, beavers telling story around table, children listening eagerly, map or prophecy shown, cozy firelight, centered on excited faces.

pages.latin_text: In viā Pater Nātālis venit.
pages.english_text: On the way Father Christmas came.
pages.image_prompt: Snowy path with sleigh bells, Father Christmas approaching on reindeer sleigh, hopeful mood breaking winter gloom, eye-level on arrival, festive glow.

pages.latin_text: Dēdit Petrō gladium et clipeum, Susannae arcum et sagittās, Luciae pōtiōnem sānantem et pūgiōnem.
pages.english_text: He gave Peter a sword and shield, Susan a bow and arrows, Lucy a healing potion and dagger.
pages.image_prompt: Father Christmas handing out gifts in snowy clearing, children receiving weapons excitedly, practical tools gleaming, centered action, bright holiday lighting.

pages.latin_text: Maleficae Edmundī prōditiōne eum cēpit.
pages.english_text: By Edmund's betrayal the Witch captured him.
pages.image_prompt: Icy castle interior, Witch's minions dragging Edmund in chains, dark and cold atmosphere, dramatic shadows, eye-level on capture moment.

pages.latin_text: Aslan aliōs ad Mēnsam Lapideam vocāvit. Malefica dīxit Edmundō mortem merērī.
pages.english_text: Aslan called the others to the Stone Table. The Witch said Edmund deserved death.
pages.image_prompt: Stone Table camp with Aslan welcoming children, Witch confronting group in background, tense standoff, firelight and moonlight mix, centered on table.

pages.latin_text: Aslan sē prō eō moritūrum esse dīxit. Mediā nocte Aslan occīsus est.
pages.english_text: Aslan said he would die for him. At midnight Aslan was killed.
pages.image_prompt: Dramatic midnight scene at Stone Table, Aslan lying sacrificed, Witch triumphant, somber dark mood with stark shadows, slightly above view.

pages.latin_text: Lucia et Susanna flēbant.
pages.english_text: Lucy and Susan wept.
pages.image_prompt: Sisters crying beside the Stone Table, dark night with faint stars, emotional grief focus, close eye-level composition, soft shading.

pages.latin_text: Aurōra venit. Magīa profundior Aslanem revocāvit.
pages.english_text: Dawn came. Deeper magic revived Aslan.
pages.image_prompt: Sunrise over Stone Table, Aslan rising alive with cracking stone, joyful light breaking darkness, centered resurrection action, warm dawn colors.

pages.latin_text: Vīvit iterum! Currit ad castellum Maleficae.
pages.english_text: He lives again! He runs to the Witch's castle.
pages.image_prompt: Aslan charging toward icy castle in dawn light, dynamic running pose, hopeful energy, wide eye-level view of approach, brightening sky.

pages.latin_text: Statuās lapideās tangit et vīvās facit.
pages.english_text: He touches the stone statues and makes them live.
pages.image_prompt: Inside castle, Aslan breathing life into stone creatures awakening joyfully, magical transformation sparks, centered on revival, warm magic glow.

pages.latin_text: In proeliō apud flūmen Petrus fortiter pugnat.
pages.english_text: In the battle by the river Peter fights bravely.
pages.image_prompt: Chaotic river battle scene, Peter swinging sword against dark forces, action-packed but simple composition, eye-level on combat, dramatic daylight.

pages.latin_text: Aslan baculum Maleficae frangit et eam vincit.
pages.english_text: Aslan breaks the Witch's wand and defeats her.
pages.image_prompt: Climactic moment, Aslan shattering wand and overpowering Witch, triumphant pose, epic center focus, bright victory lighting with debris.

pages.latin_text: Nix liquēscit, et vēr venit.
pages.english_text: Snow melts, and spring comes.
pages.image_prompt: Winter transforming to spring, melting snow revealing flowers and green, joyful nature rebirth, wide eye-level landscape, vibrant shifting colors.

pages.latin_text: Aslan eōs apud Cair Paravel corōnat.
pages.english_text: Aslan crowns them at Cair Paravel.
pages.image_prompt: Grand castle ceremony by sea, Aslan placing crowns, regal atmosphere, centered on crowning, sunny warm lighting.

pages.latin_text: Petrus Magnificus, Susanna Lenis, Edmundus Iūstus, Luciā Valēns fīunt.
pages.english_text: They become Peter the Magnificent, Susan the Gentle, Edmund the Just, Lucy the Valiant.
pages.image_prompt: Four children on thrones in castle hall, proud kingly poses, celebratory mood, eye-level on group, golden hour light.

pages.latin_text: Post multōs annōs cervum album vident et eum sequuntur. Per armārium redeunt in Angliam, paulō postquam discesserant.
pages.english_text: Years later they see a white stag and follow it. Through the wardrobe they return to England, shortly after they left.
pages.image_prompt: Forest chase of white stag leading to glowing wardrobe portal, children riding horses, magical return transition, dynamic eye-level action, mystical light.

pages.latin_text: Professor rīdet et dīcit: “Narnia iterum vōs vocābit.”
pages.english_text: The Professor smiles and says: 'Narnia will call you again.'
pages.image_prompt: Children back in house with Professor, wardrobe closed, knowing smiles all around, cozy room lighting, centered on group conversation, warm closure mood.
